profile.tagline: I build apps and interfaces, whether they run in the browser or on a microcontroller.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a software developer comfortable working at any layer of the stack — frontend, backend, or somewhere in between. I care about building things that work well, not just things that technically work, and I do my best when there's room to actually understand the problem before jumping to a solution. I'm currently on the R&D team at NTT Data, where projects vary quite a bit. I've worked on the frontend of an internal company chatbot and patched security vulnerabilities on software already in production. Before NTT, I worked on the backend of a wellness app at AlphaWaves and on the UI of internal tooling at MSC.
about.bio2: In my spare time I build personal apps. Away from the screen I spend time with friends — on the padel court, following F1, or on the couch with a controller.

contact.title: Contact
contact.headline: Got a project in mind?
contact.subtitle: If you need a website, an app, or a dashboard to manage your business, reach out.
